name: English Muffin Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat your oven to the desired temperature.
2. Mix water, sugar, salt, baking soda, and yeast in a large bowl until combined.
3. Add bread flour and nonfat dry milk to the wet ingredients. Stir until a shaggy dough forms.
4. Shape the dough into a loaf and place it on a greased baking sheet.
5. Bake according to your recipe's instructions.
6. Remove from the oven and let cool before slicing.
(Note: The top of the bread is expected to sink during baking.)
